creator: hummeltech@sherpaguru.com
text:
Created attachment 241867
Revert Mapnik removal & update to 3.1.0

Added missing `LIB_DEPENDS` entries, build missing `pgsql2sqlite` binary, resolve SCONS configure `SyntaxWarning`, utilise `sqlite:3` `USES` macro rather than `LIB_DEPENDS` for `SQLITE3` option.
